---
title: "Skip Nodes T Demo"
format: html
filters:
  - tlang
---

# Introduction

This demo showcases the `noop` attribute in T, which allows marking nodes to be skipped during the actual pipeline build.

# Skiped Node Status

In this pipeline, `expensive_node` is marked as `noop = true`.

```{t}
#| label: skip-status
node_exp = read_node("expensive_node")
print(str_join(["Expensive node noop status: ", str_string(node_exp.noop)]))
```

# Conclusion

The `noop` feature is useful for skipping heavy computations during development or when using static data stubs.
